Invalid node-authored response: delegate responses requested 3 helpers but max_helpers is 2. Raw response excerpt: {
  "schema_name": "eywa_node_response",
  "schema_version": "v1",
  "orchestration_decision": "delegate",
  "decision_notes": "The problem requires a multi-dimensional mapping between two distinct theoretical frameworks (Quantum Darwinism and Holographic QEC) and a gap analysis of existing literature. I have decomposed this into three specialized tasks: one for the physical/information-theoretic mapping, one for the mathematical/algebraic correspondence, and one for the literature/gap analysis....
